div1.entryFree: Like, conj. == as: came pouring, l. the tide into a breach, H5 I, 2, 149. and l. an arrow shot from a well-experienced archer hits the mark, Per. I, 1, 163 (Ff as). l. goodly buildings left without a roof soon fall to ruin, II, 4, 36. In Mids. IV, 1, 178 M. Edd. l. in sickness, O. Edd. l. a sickness. In Lucr. 506 there may be an anacoluthon (cf. Walker's Crit. Exam. II, 115).
